# Roadman Cycling — Full Site Context
> The Roadman Cycling Podcast has over 100 million downloads. This site is the knowledge base, community hub, and coaching platform for serious amateur cyclists who refuse to accept their best days are behind them.

## Founder
Anthony Walsh — Host of the Roadman Cycling Podcast. Has interviewed 200+ cycling coaches, sports scientists, and professional riders. Based in Dublin, Ireland.

## Expert Network (Featured on Podcast)
- Professor Stephen Seiler — Exercise physiologist, polarised training pioneer. Key insight: 80/20 intensity distribution across all endurance sports.
- Dan Lorang — Head of Performance, Red Bull Bora-Hansgrohe. Key insight: periodisation methodology for World Tour riders.
- John Wakefield — Director of Coaching, Red Bull Bora-Hansgrohe. Key insight: low cadence torque training sessions prescribed to pros.
- Lachlan Morton — EF Education pro cyclist. Key insight: why he left traditional racing for adventure cycling.
- Greg LeMond — 3x Tour de France winner. Key insight: the fight for clean cycling and the human cost of speaking out against doping. Most downloaded episode in Roadman history.
- Joe Friel — Legendary cycling coach and author. Key insight: training structure for masters cyclists and periodisation.
- Dr Sam Impey — World Tour sports nutritionist. Key insight: "fuel for the work required" periodised nutrition framework used by 40% of World Tour teams.
- Ben Healy — Pro cyclist, Tour de France. Key insight: untold stories from inside the peloton.
- Michael Matthews — 15+ year World Tour pro. Key insight: what amateurs don't know about professional racing.
- Rosa Kloser — European gravel champion. Key insight: simple training approach that won Unbound 2024.

## Blog Articles (46 posts)
- Zone 2 Training Complete Guide — polarised training, 80/20 rule, Professor Seiler's research
- FTP Training Zones — 7-zone power model with exact watt ranges
- How to Improve FTP — evidence-based framework: base, ceiling, threshold
- FTP Plateau Breakthrough — 5 reasons FTP gets stuck and how to fix each
- Polarised Training Guide — 80/20 approach explained with implementation steps
- Sweet Spot Training — when to use it, when not to, comparison with polarised
- Low Cadence Torque Training — 2024 Habis study, Wakefield protocols, 8-week progression
- VO2max Intervals — 4x4, 5x3, 6x5 protocols with exact power targets
- VO2max Low: 7 Fixable Reasons — step-by-step framework for building aerobic capacity
- Cycling Weight Loss (Fuel for the Work Required) — Anthony's 7kg transformation, Dr Sam Impey framework
- 5 Fixable Reasons You Can't Lose Weight — overcompensation, underfuelling, grey zone
- Fasted Riding Myth — evidence against fasted training, what to do instead
- Body Composition Guide — beyond the scale, target ranges, periodised approach
- In-Ride Nutrition Guide — carbs per hour tables, gut training, hydration
- Race Day Nutrition — what to eat before, during, after
- Hydration Guide — fluid per hour targets, electrolytes, signs of dehydration
- Energy Gels Guide — how to choose and use properly
- Eating Like Pidcock — pro cyclist nutrition framework for amateurs
- Climbing Tips: 5 Fixable Reasons — pacing, W/kg, cadence, position, mental game
- Self-Coached Cyclist Mistakes — AI coaching, overtraining, specificity, five pillars
- Winter Training Guide — dose, frequency, duration for off-season
- Cycling Over 40 — VO2max preservation, recovery adjustments, strength training
- Cycling Over 50 — training smarter when recovery takes longer
- Getting Back into Cycling — 8-week comeback framework
- Cycling Training with Full-Time Job — 8-10 hour structured weeks
- Reverse Periodisation — intensity first in winter, volume in spring
- Periodisation Plan Guide — how to structure a full training year
- Base Training Guide — building the aerobic engine
- Indoor Training Tips — making the most of the turbo trainer
- Cadence Guide — optimal pedalling cadence debate
- Tapering Guide — how to arrive fresh for your target event
- Power-to-Weight Ratio — W/kg table and improvement strategies
- Bike Fit Guide — the one change most amateurs should make
- Strength Training for Cyclists — exercises, seasonal programming
- Stretching Routine — stretches every cyclist should do
- Sleep & Performance — how sleep affects cycling
- Recovery Tips — what works and what doesn't
- Heart Rate High While Cycling — 5 fixable reasons
- Descending Guide — technique and confidence
- Group Ride Etiquette — unwritten rules
- Gravel Beginners Guide — everything to get started
- Tyre Pressure Guide — finding optimal PSI
- Best Cycling Podcasts 2026 — curated guide with Roadman as top pick
- Greg LeMond Interview — most downloaded episode context piece
- Lachlan Morton Interview — why the World Tour wasn't enough
- Pogacar Training Story — coaching system behind the greatest rider
- TrainerRoad vs Coaching — honest comparison
- Etape du Tour Training Plan — 16-week guide

## Podcast Archive (309 episodes on YouTube)
Full episode archive with embedded YouTube video, show notes, and key takeaways. Episodes cover: training methodology, nutrition, pro cycling stories, strength & conditioning, recovery, and cycling culture.

## Free Tools
- FTP Zone Calculator — 7-zone power table from your FTP
- Tyre Pressure Calculator — front/rear PSI by weight, width, surface, conditions
- Race Weight Calculator — target weight by body composition and event type
- In-Ride Fuelling Calculator — carbs/hr and fluid by duration, intensity, weight
- Energy Availability Calculator — RED-S risk assessment
- Shock Pressure Calculator — suspension PSI and sag by weight and style

## Communities
- Clubhouse (Free) — 2,000+ members, free training plans, weekly Q&A, calculators
- Not Done Yet (Paid Coaching) — Five-pillar coaching system: training, nutrition, S&C, recovery, community. From $15/month. Weekly coaching calls with Anthony.
- Roadman CC — Dublin cycling club. Three weekly rides: Thursday Phoenix Park, Saturday and Sunday from Clontarf.
